exercises.title: Your First Program
exercises.description: Write a program that prints 'Hello, Python!'
exercises.explanation: Use the print() function to display text. The text must be in quotes.

exercises.title: Print Multiple Lines
exercises.explanation: Each print() call creates a new line of output.

exercises.title: Python Version Check
exercises.description: Write a program that shows the Python version
exercises.explanation: Use the sys module to access version information.

exercises.title: Interactive Input
exercises.description: Ask for user's name and greet them
exercises.expected_answer:
name = input('What is your name? ')
print('Hello, ' + name)
exercises.solution:
name = input('What is your name? ')
print('Hello, ' + name)
exercises.explanation: Use input() to get user input and store it in a variable.
